phase_title: Generate Prisma Client in the Railway API image build
activation_note: Human-approved autonomous Railway remote-build Prisma runtime-copy phase. Execute only in a clean registered secondary worktree, use network and remote mutation only within the manifest Railway scope, and publish only the implementation commit after all gates pass.

last_result.validation_summary: Offline frozen install passed without manifest changes; workspace typecheck passed; workspace build passed; git diff --check passed; Railway remote Docker build and API-only deployment completed; build logs showed Prisma generate and runtime generated-client copy; Railway SSH new PrismaClient construction passed; /api/health and /api/public/matches returned HTTP 200 live; /api/internal/db/status returned HTTP 200 live with connected=true using an existing token that was not printed; no migration, seed, schema, dependency, lockfile, Neon, Web, Worker, or DATABASE_URL mutation occurred.
